name: 17"x17" Calathea Outdoor Throw Pillow Navy Blue - Threshold™
description:
Add tropical style to your patio furniture with this Calathea Outdoor Throw Pillow from Threshold™. Featuring weather-resistant fabric and UV protection qualities, this square throw pillow is adorned with bold Calathea foliage in green, maroon and orange on a navy background and brown jute twin tassels on each corner for a lively look. The decorative outdoor pillow features a soft filled polyester core and a 100% recycled polyester shell that will provide you with plenty of comfort when relaxing in your fave chair or couch in the garden or on the deck.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
